items.title: World First: XGRIDS PortalCam Wins Four NAB 2026 Product of the Year Awards
items.summary: At the NAB Show, XGRIDS's spatial camera PortalCam won four Product of the Year awards across Intelligent Technology, Graphics, Editing & Visual Effects, and Photography Equipment & Remote Production.
items.content: The organizers described XGRIDS's spatial intelligence technology as "one of the most cutting-edge innovative intelligent technologies in the film and television industry today."

about.label: About Us
about.title: Technology Experts with a Global Vision
about.story:
Mission: Focused on the European market, we leverage local operations and supply chain advantages to provide tech brands in spatial intelligence, security, and AI hardware with a one-stop market-entry solution — helping partners establish a foothold quickly and create long-term value.

Vision: To become Europe's most trusted benchmark for tech companies going global — breaking down full-chain operational barriers, enabling professional B2B empowerment and B2C terminal sales in tandem, and building the bridge for global tech products into Europe.

l2pro.name: Lixel L2 Pro
l2pro.desc: The new Lixel L2 Pro combines LiDAR, visual, and IMU modules with AI, delivering real-time point cloud data that rivals post-processed quality, ushering in the "zero post-processing era" for SLAM devices.

k1.name: LixelKity K1
k1.desc: Compact, powerful, and precise. Generate rich-colored, finely detailed 3D models with unmatched ease and speed.

portalcam.name: PortalCam
portalcam.desc: PortalCam captures real spaces as photorealistic 3D worlds. Powered by 3D Gaussian Splatting, PortalCam turns any location into interactive spatial models you can walk through, edit, and share. This is how content gets made now.

studio.name: LixelStudio
studio.desc: Desktop point cloud processing and 3D model generation

go.name: LixelGo
go.desc: Mobile scanning control and real-time preview

lcc.name: Lixel CyberColor (LCC)
lcc.desc: AI-driven 3DGS reconstruction platform for automated large-scale photorealistic models

revit.name: LCC for Revit
revit.desc: BIM integration plugin — 3DGS empowering architectural information modeling

hero.title: Drone Detection & Defence
hero.description: Our solutions focus on passive radio spectrum analysis. It can be used in any scenario in full compliance. We have a wide portfolio that can fit into many scenarios. Our technology includes AOA, TDOA, Decoding and RID.

portable.title: Portable
portable.desc: Mobile detection devices for rapid deployment

items.name: DGH2
items.tagline: Handheld drone detection for field operations — passive RF scanning up to 3 km
items.description: GlobeProtect H2 is a portable handheld unit for mobile drone detection. It passively scans the radio spectrum without emitting any signal, detecting commercial drones including FPV and Wi-Fi models up to 3 km away. Identifies drone serial numbers, supports Black- & Whitelist classification, and navigates to the pilot's location via Google Maps. Integrates into the GlobeProtect Management Platform as an additional receiving unit.

fixed.title: Fixed
fixed.desc: Permanently installed detection and defense equipment

items.name: DGM2J
items.tagline: Vehicle-mounted detection and jamming system for mobile deployment
items.description: GlobeProtect M2J is a vehicle-mountable detection and defence system combining passive RF detection with optional jamming. It detects commercial drones up to 5 km while in motion and can disrupt control and navigation signals up to 2 km. Automated detection-to-defence link reduces response time to approximately 3 seconds.

items.name: DGS2
items.tagline: Stationary TDOA antenna for wide-area drone localization up to 6 km
items.description: GlobeProtect S2 is a stationary TDOA antenna operable independently or in a network of up to 16 units. When three or more are networked, TDOA localization tracks drones including FPV in real time with 1–3 s updates. Includes serial number identification, Black- & Whitelist classification, and optional sector detection.

items.name: DGS2 Mini
items.tagline: Compact stationary TDOA antenna for scalable networked drone detection
items.description: GlobeProtect S2mini is a compact antenna for space-constrained installations. Each unit independently detects drones up to 2 km. When three or more antennas are networked, TDOA localization tracks all drone types including FPV. Supports RID-only, encoding, or full networked TDOA mode.

items.name: DGS2D
items.tagline: Directional AOA antenna combining wide-range detection with precise sector tracking
items.description: GlobeProtect S2D adds Angle of Arrival (AOA) sector detection to the S2 platform, determining the directional approach angle to within 3–10°. Fully passive RF, 100 MHz–6 GHz coverage. IP65-rated for outdoor installation and integrable into a TDOA network.

items.name: DGR3
items.tagline: Dedicated Remote-ID receiver for standards-compliant drone identification up to 3 km
items.description: GlobeProtect R3 is a passive Remote-ID receiver capturing broadcast signals from compliant drones via Bluetooth 4/5 and Wi-Fi Beacon/NAN. Supports three major international standards. IP66-rated, AC/DC powered, suitable for permanent outdoor installation.

items.name: DGD1
items.tagline: Long-range stationary decoding station extending detection coverage up to 10 km
items.description: GlobeProtect D1 is a high-power stationary decoding station passively monitoring drone video and control signals across five frequency bands up to 10 km. Multiple units can be networked to cover larger areas, ideal for wide-area perimeter protection of critical infrastructure.

items.name: GlobeProtect Management Platform
items.tagline: Browser-based command platform for unified drone detection, zone management, and countermeasure control
items.description: The GlobeProtect Management Platform is a browser-based solution providing a unified view across one or more detection zones. Operators can define warning zones, whitelist known drones, trigger countermeasures, and review historical data through heat maps and track replay. Supports offline LAN, server-hosted, and on-premises deployment.

items.title: Prison
items.desc: Real-time monitoring and interception of drones attempting to deliver contraband, conduct illegal surveillance, or aid prison escapes.

items.title: Airport
items.desc: Continuous airspace monitoring to prevent drone interference with flight paths and ensure safe aircraft takeoff and landing.

items.title: Border
items.desc: Remote automated early warning against drone-based cross-border smuggling, illegal entry, and espionage reconnaissance.

items.title: Government Facilities
items.desc: Comprehensive low-altitude protection against unauthorized aerial photography, information theft, and security threats to sensitive areas.

items.title: Factory
items.desc: Prevent aerial photography leaks of trade secrets and core processes, while reducing risks of drone collisions with flammable or explosive facilities.

items.title: Hotel
items.desc: Effectively intercept drone voyeurism targeting guest rooms, fully protecting personal privacy and accommodation dignity.
